Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\JacobMadsen\\source\\repos\\strudel-dj" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Prune CLAUDE.md and extract workflow to slash commands

- Reduce CLAUDE.md from 522 to 102 lines \(81% reduction\)
- Move phase history to new CHANGELOG.md
- Create slash commands for development workflow:
  - /start-session: bootstrap new sessions
  - /execute-phase: implement with todos and quality checks
  - /quality-check: run type-check, lint, test, build
  - /test-changes: verify behavior with Playwright
  - /complete-phase: finalize and push
  - /refine-next-phase: plan and identify blockers

Note: Commands are in .claude/commands/ \(gitignored, local only\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

\)")

Phase 4: UI/UX Polish - dark theme, settings, shortcuts, indicators

Features:
- Dark theme applied throughout application
- Settings panel \(BPM, quantization, transition style, audio device, latency\)
- Keyboard shortcuts: Space \(play/pause\), Ctrl+Enter \(promote\), F9 \(DevTools\)
- PlaybackIndicator with beat dots, cycle counter, LIVE indicator
- CodeMirror-style editor with line numbers
- Pending transition countdown display

Bug fixes:
- Guard setBPM/setCPS for uninitialized scheduler \(warns instead of errors\)
- Fix beat indicator animation \(Pinia getter caching → actions\)
- Change DevTools shortcut to F9 \(Ctrl+Shift+D conflicted with Chrome\)

Tests: 138 passing, 24 skipped

UI refinements and audio fixes

UI Changes:
- Swap editor positions: Cue \(left\), Master \(right\) to match DJ convention
- Rename "Main" to "Master" throughout UI
- Simplify labels to just "Cue" and "Master"
- Shorten promote button to just "Promote"
- Auto-close DevTools when any option is selected

Audio Fixes:
- Fix Master mute: control Strudel''s gainNode directly
- Fix sample loading: properly import/await samples\(\) from @strudel/webaudio
- Add registerSynthSounds\(\) for built-in synth sounds
- Fix audio init error by removing problematic gain node reconnection

Documentation:
- Add Stereo Cue \(Mix Knob\) to future roadmap in ARCHITECTURE.md
- Update CHANGELOG.md with latest changes
